title: stipa elongata
intro: Stipa elongata, also known as Blue Bunchgrass, is a species of grass native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Stipa elongata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Stipa elongata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
